name: zrndr_span_occlusion_rasterize
description: zRndr::SpanOcclusionRasterizeOccluderPoly converts occluder polygons into per-column span nodes through the active span-list builder.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?SpanOcclusionRasterizeOccluderPoly@zRndr@@YIXPAUSpanOccluderPolyPartial@1@H@Z at 0x4927d0 still fails: 1744 unmasked mismatches, 76 relocation bytes masked, BN size 1828 bytes, VC object symbol size 848 bytes.

Reviewed difference is broad source-shape drift in the polygon reduction/rasterization body. The native smoke covers rectangular and triangular occluders, span allocation, per-column min/max coverage, depth values, and empty-column behavior through the real span-list builder.
